items.hook: BCA has found that boutique condo projects tend to carry more construction defects than
items.caption:
BCA has found that boutique condo projects tend to carry more construction defects than larger developments. If you are about to collect your keys, do not rush the handover inspection or treat it as a formality. Bring in an independent inspector before you accept the unit, and document every defect with photos and a written list. Research your project and know what to check with the free tools at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to a friend who is house hunting.
items.cap_zh:
BCA发现，精品condo项目在交房时出现建筑缺陷的概率比大型楼盘更高。如果你快要收钥匙了，验房这一关千万不能草草了事。在签署接收表格之前，找一位独立验房师来做检查，把所有缺陷逐一拍照记录。前往 propsight.sg 使用免费工具，提前了解你的项目情况，掌握自己的权益，链接在简介栏。

把这个发给正在看房的朋友。

items.hook: At new condo launches, agents have been getting early access to units ahead of the publi
items.caption:
At new condo launches, agents have been getting early access to units ahead of the public ballot, giving their clients a better shot at securing a home. If you have ever missed out and wondered why, this is likely part of the reason. Regulators are now looking at the practice, and tighter rules on launch-day sales could be on the way. See what new launch units have actually been transacting at over at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
新私人condo推出时，经纪人往往能在公开抽签之前帮客户抢先锁定单位。如果你曾经在新盘中落选，这很可能就是原因之一。监管机构正在审查这个做法，新盘销售规则可能即将收紧，让普通买家有更公平的机会。想查看新盘实际成交价格，去propsight.sg免费查询，链接在简介里。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: Lentor Gardens Residences pulled in 5,000 visitors over the preview weekend, one of the
items.caption:
Lentor Gardens Residences pulled in 5,000 visitors over the preview weekend, one of the strongest showings for any new launch this year. That level of interest almost always pushes final prices above the initial guide, and units in hot launches move fast. If you are serious about a unit here, get your loan In-Principle Approval sorted now, not after the balloting queue forms. Check affordability and compare new launch data free at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
Lentor Gardens Residences 预览周末吸引了5,000名访客，是今年人气最旺的新盘之一。这种高人气通常意味着最终成交价会超过指导价，热门单位往往卖得很快。如果你有意购买，现在就要把贷款预批（IPA）准备好，不要等到排队当天才着急。想免费查询新盘价格和负担能力，请访问 propsight.sg，链接在简介里。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Your flat may be worth more than the agent says.
The PropSight tools are free to use.
